<onlyinclude><templatestyles src="Infobox_character/styles.css" /><infobox theme="character-infobox">
    <title source="name">
        <format><center>'''{{#if: {{{primary_color|}}} | <span style="color:{{{primary_color}}}">{{{name}}}</span> | {{{name}}} }}'''{{#if: {{{employee_id|}}} | <br/><span style="font-size: 0.7em; font-weight: normal;">Employee #{{{employee_id}}}</span>}}</format>
    </title>
    <image source="icon">
        <format>[[File:{{{icon}}}|center|alt=Icon of {{{name}}}]]</format>
    </image>
    <panel>
        <data source="default_ability">
            <label>Default Ability</label>
            <format>{{{default_ability}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="playable">
            <label>Playable</label>
            <format>{{{playable}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="max_level">
            <label>Max Level</label>
            <format>{{{max_level}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="min_unlock_level">
            <label>Min Unlock Level</label>
            <format>{{{min_unlock_level}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="skin_count">
            <label>Skins</label>
            <format>{{{skin_count}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="index">
            <label>Roster #</label>
            <format>{{{index}}}</format>
        </data>{{#if: {{{api_name|}}} |
        <section collapse="closed">
            <header>Technical Information</header>
            <data source="api_name">
                <label>API Name</label>
                <format><code>{{{api_name}}}</code></format>
            </data>
        </section>}}
    </panel>
</infobox></onlyinclude>
==Documentation==
This template displays a playable character in a Portable Infobox.

==How to Use==
<pre>
{{Infobox character
|name = Display name (e.g. "Wrangler")
|api_name = Internal APIName
|icon = Icon filename
|employee_id = In-fiction employee number
|index = Roster position
|playable = Yes | No
|max_level = Max XP level
|min_unlock_level = Player level required to unlock
|skin_count = Number of skins
|default_ability = Signature ability name (e.g. "AirDash")
|primary_color = Hex theme color (e.g. "#ff306f")
|text_color = Hex text color
}}
</pre>

==Example Usage==
<pre>
{{Infobox character
|name = Wrangler
|api_name = Wrangler
|icon = Wrangler_icon.png
|employee_id = 84239756
|index = 0
|playable = Yes
|max_level = 30
|skin_count = 12
|default_ability = AirDash
|primary_color = #ff306f
|text_color = #ffd6e2
}}
</pre>
===Result===
{{Infobox character
|name = Wrangler
|api_name = Wrangler
|icon = Wrangler_icon.png
|employee_id = 84239756
|index = 0
|playable = Yes
|max_level = 30
|skin_count = 12
|default_ability = AirDash
|primary_color = #ff306f
|text_color = #ffd6e2
}}

[[Category:Templates]]
